essence: David directs that the agentic-OS documentation be finished rich-data-first, then packaged as a file list plus handover instructions so NotebookLM can ingest it and generate diagrams and implementation options.

essence: David is stressed that bills are due but the K Bank money he was counting on isn't there, insisting he needs full financial visibility to decide anything, then pivots to checking whether local upstream repos and architecture docs are current.

David juggles Mac pain (M4 Mini duplicate naming, iTerm2+Claude sessions making reboots costly, 10-month-old MacBook display failure headed to AppleCare) with a tense shop meeting with Joy — free green-tea-soda sample promotion to build excitement, and a confrontation demanding daily truthful K Bank + cash reporting after being blindsided by a 14-19k balance.

Start free sample-drink promotion (shot glasses of green tea soda) before the shop is fully open

essence: David articulates the micro-app suite vision — POEM-based human-in-the-loop workflows powering bespoke file-system apps (FliHub, FliDeck, Storyline, FliGen, Deckhand, a repo voice app) built as CLI/AppyStack/Ruby and suited to Claude Code — while wrestling a Tailscale login issue that must be documented as a post-Ansible step.

essence: David probes whether the Elgato application must be running for Stream Deck control and whether other techniques exist, while sorting folders and checking partition sizes on the T7 external drive.

David adopts the primary/optional package-manager recommendation (Bun primary, pnpm optional) for new apps and has it captured into the agentic OS, wants a Stream Deck starter plan that avoids manually opening the Elgato app, and puts the Apple Mac warranty claim on today's to-do list.

essence: Working mouse-only around a dead MacBook display, David reviews the to-do system and asserts that not all brains are equal — the to-do list is an action-oriented system, not a standard knowledge brain — asking for pattern review against Claude Code and Dynamous brains and clear index.md cross-links.
